claim_boundary: Preregistered no-submit mechanism panel only. No AF2 prediction has run, W2c remains terminal, and no positive independent-predictor robustness claim is supported.

decision_contract.claim_scope: bounded challenge-panel mechanism adjudication only; not population-level independent-predictor robustness

joint_outcomes.if: 3PC8 is Boltz-supported and W2c is Boltz-supported
3PC8 is Chai-supported and W2c shows strong instability
the two blocks disagree, either block is mixed, controls fail, or any contract check fails

decision_contract.label: lrmsd_to_reference < 4.0 Angstrom after target-chain alignment

three_pc8.boltz_supported_if: at least 10/12 discordant labels align with Boltz and at least 5/6 controls succeed
three_pc8.chai_supported_if: at least 10/12 discordant labels align with Chai and at least 5/6 controls succeed

w2c.boltz_supported_if: at least 32/40 labels agree globally and at least 6/8 targets have at least 4/5 agreement
w2c.strong_instability_if: at most 24/40 labels agree globally or at most 3/8 targets have at least 4/5 agreement
w2c.threshold_rationale: 0.80 reuses the preregistered minimum cross-predictor label agreement; 0.60 marks agreement no better than the observed Boltz-Chai result.

blockers: validated ColabFold 1.6.1 runtime receipt with an immutable image or binary identity is required
local AlphaFold2-Multimer weights must be verified before execution
a separate exact approval is required before any H100/GPU/HPC execution

msa_policy.evolutionary_pairing: paired query row only; no paired homolog rows
msa_policy.target: reuse the existing hash-locked target MSA

scientific_question: Does the W2c divergence between pAE ranking and protocol-usable selective coverage reflect reproducible target/coverage heterogeneity, or predictor/protocol label instability of the kind exposed by the Boltz-Chai disagreement?

selection_lock.three_pc8_panel: preserve all 18 previously frozen challenge rows unchanged
selection_lock.w2c_order: sort within target by (pae_interaction ascending, target_id ascending)

w2c_characterization.interpretation_boundary: These are descriptive diagnostics of the completed W2c learning set. They do not retune, rescue, reopen, or authorize W2c.
